productDisplayName: Spinn Men Bounce Grey Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Bounce shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe with an upraised heel and lace-up fastening and mesh inlaysWell padded collar and tongue (with branding)Foamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with a decoupled heel, curved midfoot and patterned lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
